page: Microsoft Azure DS2 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the DS server family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 2 dedicated physical cores and 2 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor operating at a clock speed of 2.6 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 7.0 GB of system memory, providing 3.5 GB of RAM per core, and 14 GB of local storage. The processor supports Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX and AVX512F), AES cryptography, and BMI2, ADX, and FMA instruction sets, though it lacks support for AVX-512 VNNI, AMX, and SHA_NI extensions.

In benchmark evaluations, the DS2 demonstrates entry-level performance characteristics across compute and memory subsystems. The stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU tests place the instance in the bottom 25% of tested hardware, with scores of 1246.48 and 2469.01 respectively. Memory bandwidth tests show a read-only small block cached speed of 178.4 GB/sec, which drops to 23.29 GB/sec for large uncached blocks, and a write speed of 16.93 GB/sec. Geekbench metrics reflect similar performance tiers, with a single-core score of 1044.0 and a multi-core score of 1906.0, indicating limited capacity for highly parallelized workloads.

Given its resource profile, the DS2 is suited for lightweight workloads such as basic web serving, small-scale database operations, and simple text or image processing. Passmark database operations scored 1281.9, and Redis SET operations achieved 3.02 million operations per second, confirming its utility for low-traffic applications. The instance offers a cost-efficient entry point for development, testing, and small utility services that do not require high-performance computing, massive memory arrays, or GPU acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure DS2 is an entry-level, general-purpose virtual machine within the DS family, utilizing the x86_64 architecture under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 2 physical cores from an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor running at 2.6 GHz, paired with 7.0 GB of memory and 14 GB of local storage. Benchmark results place the instance's compute and memory performance consistently in the lower tiers, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 1906.0 and a stress-ng multi-core score of 2469.01. The processor supports AVX, AVX512F, and AES instructions but lacks newer deep learning extensions like AMX. This instance is qualitatively positioned as a budget-friendly option for low-intensity workloads, including basic web serving, small databases, and lightweight development or testing environments.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DS2 is an x86_64 general-purpose virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 7.0 GB of RAM, and 14 GB of local storage, designed for entry-level workloads and basic web serving.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DS2 is a general-purpose VM with 2 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 7.0 GB of RAM, and 14 GB of local storage for lightweight workloads.
tagline: A dedicated dual-core virtual machine with balanced memory and local storage for entry-level computing and development environments.
bullet_points: Powered by 2 dedicated Intel Xeon 8272CL vCPUs running at 2.6 GHz
Equipped with 7.0 GB of system memory and 14 GB of local storage
Supports AVX, AVX512F, and AES hardware-accelerated instructions
Delivers entry-level compute performance suitable for low-traffic applications
Best suited for lightweight web serving, small databases, and testing
